description: Alfreds Futterkiste and Ernst Handel have raised invoice disputes that must be resolved before month-end close. Resolve the dispute for Alfreds Futterkiste by issuing a full credit note for invoice INV-A002 and a partial credit note for the pricing error on invoice INV-A003. For Ernst Handel, allocate the unallocated receipt in Cash on Hand to invoice INV-E002. Confirm the updated customer balances in the Aged Receivables report. Login: administrator (no password) at http://localhost:8080
